pageContext.name: Loki Laufeyson Bishoujo
pageContext.description: After Ragnarök, the 'end' in Norse mythology, Loki returns as a young woman. Shunya Yamashita's astounding Bishoujo Loki statue is back!  Taking possession of Sif and gaining a female body, Loki has been sculpted into a gorgeous, fashionable, and voluptuous figure. A born trickster with a good and evil side, what will Loki's next scheme be?   The Marvel figure base can be connected to that of Thor (Jane Foster) Bishoujo Statue — sold separately.
